violations.text: Dessert menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Pan of cookies were observed on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (pans of cut produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Cooked chicken was observed being stored in a box with raw. PIC moved chicken to walk in cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

(Sliced deli meats and cheese ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in coolers, back kitchen area, dessert prep area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (dessert ) area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: -food storage shelves in walk in cooler -food prep shelves -prep units -dry ingredient bins -can opener base -exterior of dough mixer -handsink Non food contact services must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The outside back grease disposal area observed with an accumulation of trash bags, litter, and/or other debris. Per PIC, waste disposal will take on 4/27/26. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The (ceiling ) in the (back kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed damaged and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The floors throughout the kitchen and walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (various food product) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Deli meats and cheeses was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

(Boxes of food product and beverages ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in freezer and front counter area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. The prep sink airgap was observed being covered with a plastic bottle and unaligned. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and/or debris were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The floors in kitchen, walk in freezer, and outside storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
